creator: me@mornfall.net
text: When trying to boot FreeBSD 10.1-RC3 images on a RPI-B+ from a Kingston micro-SDHC card, I get a panic on boot in the SDHC driver. I think it may be the same problem as this: https://lkml.org/lkml/2014/2/3/12 ... unfortunately I don't have a serial console at the moment to copy the dump or a backtrace. The SDHC card in question gives me the warning quoted in the LKML post under Linux.
